overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character riding an industrial elevator down to a neon-lit street and walking through a dystopian urban environment with holographic advertisements, futuristic vehicles, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial freight elevator with metal accordion gate

events.description: elevator begins descending as indicated by the floor counter display
elevator display changes from floor 13 to ground floor
metal accordion gate begins opening to reveal the outside

agents.ego_description: standing inside the descending elevator, observing the floor indicator and waiting to exit

entered.detail: rusted metal security gate with diamond pattern that opens and closes the elevator
digital display panel showing floor numbers with glowing cyan text and arrow indicators
tied plastic garbage bags piled in the corners of the elevator
grimy concrete walls with graffiti and blood stains near the floor

segments.scene_description: The segment takes place entirely inside a grimy industrial elevator. The metal accordion gate is initially closed then opens at the end. The elevator descends from floor 13 to ground floor while the camera remains stationary, showing trash bags, concrete walls with graffiti, and a digital control panel with cyan lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley leading to neon-lit commercial street

events.description: exits the elevator into a narrow alleyway with dumpsters and debris
emerges from the dark alley into the neon-lit city street with visible holographic signs

agents.ego_description: walking out of the elevator through a narrow back alley toward the main commercial street

entered.detail: tall concrete walls of the narrow passage with utility boxes and pipes
large industrial waste container with closed lid
glowing pink neon sign with Asian characters indicating 24-hour service

segments.scene_description: The character exits the elevator into a narrow service alley with concrete walls and dumpsters. Walking forward, the scene transitions from the enclosed dark space to an opening revealing the neon-lit city street ahead, with the first glimpse of holographic billboards and the 24-hour neon sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with holographic billboards and street barriers

events.description: futuristic sports car drives past on the street from right to left
turns slightly left while continuing to walk along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking along the wall in the same direction
pedestrian in bright pink pants standing near the graffiti wall

entered.detail: massive floating holographic advertisement showing a muscular figure with glowing elements
long wall covered in colorful cyberpunk graffiti and street art
red and white plastic construction barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
metal drum with flames providing warm orange light against the neon

segments.scene_description: Walking along the neon-lit commercial sidewalk, the character passes by a graffiti-covered wall with a burning barrel and red construction barriers. A futuristic car drives past on the street, and sparse pedestrians walk along the path. Large holographic billboards float above the street between towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with parked sports cars and neon storefront entrance

events.description: approaches the parked futuristic vehicles and neon-lit shop entrance
slows down while approaching the shop entrance with steam vents

agents.ego_description: walking past parked futuristic sports cars toward a shop entrance with prominent neon signage

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car with glowing accents parked at the curb
futuristic gold and black car parked behind the first vehicle

entered.detail: sleek cyberpunk sports cars with angular designs and neon underglow lighting
large purple neon sign depicting a cat face above the shop entrance
vents emitting white steam onto the wet pavement creating atmospheric fog
multiple flatscreen displays showing advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a commercial plaza area with several parked futuristic sports cars featuring neon underglow. Steam rises from vents on the wet pavement near a shop entrance marked by a prominent purple neon cat sign. Digital advertising screens and holographic posters cover the surrounding building walls as the character slows down near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic confines of an industrial elevator into the expansive, neon-drenched chaos of a cyberpunk city. It begins inside a grimy lift surrounded by graffiti and trash, remaining stationary until the metal accordion gate slides open to reveal a narrow service alley. As the camera moves forward through the dark corridor past dumpsters, the space opens up into a vibrant commercial street where the dim lighting shifts to a glow of holographic billboards and neon signs. The scene then expands along a sidewalk past burning barrels and futuristic traffic before turning toward a commercial plaza. Finally, the movement slows near a shop entrance marked by a purple neon cat, as steam rises from wet pavement beneath a canopy of digital advertising screens.
